title: Team Tracker Website Development
description: Build a team tracker website using GenAI technology.
business_case_summary:
Business Case Summary: Team Tracker Website Development (DEM-2026-0077)

Executive Summary
Develop a Team Tracker website leveraging GenAI technology to enhance team management and collaboration within the Customer Digital domain. This project aims to improve transparency and productivity through real-time tracking capabilities.

Business Value and Impact
The website will streamline team oversight, leading to increased efficiency and better resource allocation. Enhanced data-driven insights will support decision-making and drive customer satisfaction.

Risk Mitigation
To address medium risk, the project will incorporate phased development with ongoing testing and stakeholder feedback. Security protocols and GenAI ethical guidelines will be strictly enforced to safeguard data and compliance.
